moments.title: Love Island Final Approaches
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated final of Love Island 2026 is set to air on Monday, July 27th, on ITV2 and ITVX, concluding eight weeks of reality TV drama.

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: Just days to go until the Love Island 2026 final! Who are you rooting for to take home the £50k prize? Monday 27th July on ITV2. #LoveIsland

angles.name: Last Minute Drama
angles.copy: The Love Island villa is heating up for one last week before the final on July 27th. Expect fireworks! What's been your favourite moment this series?

moments.title: The Hundred Cricket Tournament Heats Up
moments.blurb: The Hundred 2026 men's and women's cricket tournaments are in full swing across the UK, having started on July 21st and running until August 16th, with matches happening daily.

angles.name: National Cricket
angles.copy: The Hundred is officially underway! Catch the fast-paced 100-ball cricket action this week as teams battle it out across the UK. Who's your pick to win it all? #TheHundred

angles.name: Welsh Fire Matches
angles.copy: Go, Welsh Fire! The Hundred tournament is on, and our Welsh teams are in action. Get behind them as they light up the pitch this week! #WelshFire #TheHundred

angles.name: London Teams
angles.copy: MI London and London Spirit are representing the capital in The Hundred! Huge matches happening at The Oval and Lord's this week. #TheHundred #LondonCricket

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean Top UK Singles Chart
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is the current UK Official Singles Chart Number 1 for the week ending July 23, 2026.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: New UK Number 1! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' takes the top spot on the Official Singles Chart. Tune in to hear it!

angles.name: Weekend Chart Show
angles.copy: Still buzzing about Sam Fender & Olivia Dean at Number 1! What a track. Catch the full chart rundown this weekend on Nation Hits.

moments.title: Happy 85th Birthday to George Clinton
moments.blurb: Funk pioneer George Clinton, leader of Parliament-Funkadelic, celebrates his 85th birthday today, July 22nd.

angles.name: Funk Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 85th birthday to the one and only Dr. Funkenstein, George Clinton! The funk architect behind Parliament-Funkadelic. Get down with his hits today!

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday to Don Henley
moments.blurb: Don Henley, co-founder, drummer, and vocalist of The Eagles, turns 79 today, July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to Don Henley! The voice and rhythm behind so many Eagles classics. What's your favourite Eagles track?

moments.title: Happy 34th Birthday to Selena Gomez
moments.blurb: Singer and actress Selena Gomez celebrates her 34th birthday today, July 22nd.

angles.name: Pop Star Birthday
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to the incredible Selena Gomez, turning 34 today! From pop hits to acting, she does it all. Celebrate with her biggest tracks!

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday to David Essex
moments.blurb: British singer, songwriter, and actor David Essex celebrates his 79th birthday tomorrow, July 23rd.

angles.name: Glam Rock Icon
angles.copy: Tomorrow, July 23rd, we're celebrating the 79th birthday of British icon David Essex! From 'Rock On' to his stage roles, a true legend.

moments.title: Happy 65th Birthday to Martin Gore
moments.blurb: Depeche Mode's co-founder, songwriter, and guitarist Martin Gore turns 65 tomorrow, July 23rd.

source.l: AP News / Musicians born on July 23

angles.name: Synth-Pop Mastermind
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're celebrating Martin Gore of Depeche Mode turning 65! The songwriting genius behind so many iconic tracks. What's your favourite Depeche Mode song?

moments.title: Happy 61st Birthday to Slash
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses' legendary guitarist Slash celebrates his 61st birthday tomorrow, July 23rd.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Tomorrow, July 23rd, is the 61st birthday of the one and only Slash! The top-hatted guitar hero of Guns N' Roses. Crank up your favourite GNR track!

moments.title: Happy 83rd Birthday to Mick Jagger
moments.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Legend
angles.copy: On July 26th, we're celebrating the 83rd birthday of rock and roll royalty, Mick Jagger! What's your favourite Rolling Stones anthem?

moments.title: Happy 77th Birthday to Roger Taylor
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary drummer Roger Taylor celebrates his 77th birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Queen Drummer
angles.copy: Mark your calendars for July 26th – it's Roger Taylor's 77th birthday! The powerhouse drummer for Queen. What's your favourite Queen track to drum along to?

moments.title: Happy 33rd Birthday to Stormzy
moments.blurb: Award-winning British rapper Stormzy turns 33 on July 26th.

angles.name: Grime King
angles.copy: Big up the birthday boy! Stormzy turns 33 on July 26th. Celebrate the grime king's birthday with his biggest hits!

moments.title: Happy 68th Birthday to Kate Bush
moments.blurb: The iconic and influential British singer-songwriter Kate Bush celebrates her 68th birthday on July 30th.

angles.name: Wuthering Heights Icon
angles.copy: On July 30th, we're wishing a magical 68th birthday to the one and only Kate Bush! A true visionary in music. What's your favourite Kate Bush track?

moments.title: Happy 85th Birthday to Paul Anka
moments.blurb: Legendary singer-songwriter Paul Anka, known for hits like 'Diana' and 'My Way', turns 85 on July 30th.

angles.name: Timeless Crooner
angles.copy: On July 30th, we celebrate the 85th birthday of the incredible Paul Anka! From teen idol to songwriting legend, his influence is undeniable. Sing along to his classics!

moments.title: UK Summer Holidays in Full Swing
moments.blurb: The school summer holidays are now in full effect across much of the UK, with many families enjoying breaks until early September.

angles.name: Holiday Vibes
angles.copy: School's out for summer! If you're heading off on your UK summer holiday this week, tell us where you're going!

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: Making the most of the summer holidays? Whether it's staycations or day trips, share your best family fun moments with us!
